title: List View on monday
excerpt: Would it be possible for you to release an update on iPhones and Androids that allows me, as the founder, to disable the board view and set a list view instead for specific workspaces or boards? Every time someone closes…

posts.author: Sheyzane (Sheyzane)
posts.cookedHtml: Would it be possible for you to release an update on iPhones and Androids that allows me, as the founder, to disable the board view and set a list view instead for specific workspaces or boards? Every time someone closes the Monday.com app, it automatically switches back to the board view, and let’s be honest — that view is terrible on mobile depending on what you’re trying to do. Also, Android users currently can’t even switch to list view on their phones
